intro.title: The systems, practices, and strengths behind how I work
intro.description: I care about building things that are scalable, maintainable, and actually useful for the people working with them. That includes both the code itself and the standards, collaboration, and structure around it.

leadershipStrengths.title: Code Reviews
leadershipStrengths.description: Thoughtful, collaborative reviews that improve quality without slowing teams down.

leadershipStrengths.title: Standards & Documentation
leadershipStrengths.description: Clear, practical standards that help teams work confidently and independently.

leadershipStrengths.title: Technical Leadership
leadershipStrengths.description: Leads through ambiguity with strong direction and thoughtful decision-making.

leadershipStrengths.title: Mentorship & Support
leadershipStrengths.description: Helps engineers grow through onboarding, pairing, and ongoing support.

leadershipStrengths.title: Tools I Work In
leadershipStrengths.description: Comfortable across tools that support planning, building, and shipping.

leadershipStrengths.title: Conference Speaking
leadershipStrengths.description: Shares real-world lessons with the developer community.
